name: Apostle Byarugaba Frobisher
summary: Apostle Byarugaba Frobisher is a devoted servant of God, respected spiritual leader, and passionate advocate for community transformation.
bio:
Apostle Byarugaba Frobisher is a devoted servant of God, respected spiritual leader, and passionate advocate for community transformation. As a dedicated Apostle, he has committed his life to advancing the Kingdom of God through faith, love, mentorship, and service to humanity.
With a heart deeply rooted in compassion and a strong desire to see lives transformed, Apostle Frobisher serves as a valued member of the Executive Board of Nicoville Foundation. His spiritual wisdom, leadership, and commitment to helping the less privileged have greatly contributed to the Foundation's vision of creating hope and restoring dignity in vulnerable communities.
Apostle Frobisher firmly believes that true ministry extends beyond the church walls and into the lives of people facing challenges, poverty, and hopelessness. Through his involvement with Nicoville Foundation, he actively supports initiatives that empower individuals, strengthen families, provide educational opportunities, and promote sustainable community development.
Known for his humility, integrity, and unwavering faith, he inspires many to embrace a life of purpose, compassion, and service. His leadership reflects the belief that every individual has God-given potential and deserves an opportunity to live with hope and dignity.
As a member of the Executive Board, Apostle Byarugaba Frobisher remains committed to advancing the mission of Nicoville Foundation and fostering partnerships that bring meaningful and lasting change to communities.
He warmly invites churches, organizations, leaders, and people of goodwill to join hands with Nicoville Foundation in its mission to spread love, uplift lives, and build a better future for generations to come.
"When faith is combined with compassion and action, lives are transformed, communities are restored, and hope is reborn."
Apostle Byarugaba Frobisher Executive Board Member Nicoville Foundation Spread Love, Heal The World

name: Nicholas Fredrick Nsumba
summary: Nicholas Fredrick Nsumba is a God-fearing Ugandan lawyer and Advocate practicing with Ardent Advocates. Born on 25th July 1995 and happily married, Nicholas is passionate about justice, community development, and humanitarian service.
bio: Nicholas Fredrick Nsumba is a God-fearing Ugandan lawyer and Advocate practicing with Ardent Advocates. Born on 25th July 1995 and happily married, Nicholas is passionate about justice, community development, and humanitarian service.

Driven by a deep commitment to charity and social transformation, Nicholas, together with other like-minded individuals, co-founded Nicoville Foundation in 2015 with the vision of uplifting vulnerable communities and extending hope to those in need. Through dedication and hard work, the Foundation grew and was officially registered as both a Company and a Community-Based Organization (CBO) in 2023.

Nicholas strongly believes that lasting change is achieved when people come together to serve others. He remains committed to advancing the Foundation's mission of supporting disadvantaged individuals through charitable initiatives, education, empowerment, and community outreach.

He warmly invites individuals, organizations, and well-wishers to join the cause of Nicoville Foundation through partnership, volunteerism, and donations, so that together we can create a brighter future for those in need.

name: Lwasa Nicholas Kaweesi
summary: Lwasa Nicholas Kaweesi is a passionate humanitarian, visionary leader, and devoted advocate for community transformation.
bio:
Lwasa Nicholas Kaweesi is a passionate humanitarian, visionary leader, and devoted advocate for community transformation. Born on 27th April 1995, Nicholas has dedicated his life to serving others, empowering vulnerable communities, and inspiring hope where it is needed most.Nicoville Foundation in 2015 with the vision of uplifting vulnerable communities and extending hope to those in need. Through dedication and hard work, the Foundation grew and was officially registered as both a Company and a Community-Based Organization (CBO) in 2023
Driven by a deep conviction that love, compassion, and faith can change lives, Nicholas founded Nicoville Foundation with a mission to reach the disadvantaged, uplift the vulnerable, and create opportunities for individuals and families facing hardship. His desire to establish the Foundation was born from witnessing the struggles of many people in society and recognizing the need for an organization that would not only provide support but also restore dignity, hope, and purpose.
Under his leadership, Nicoville Foundation has become a beacon of hope, guided by its motto: "Spread Love, Heal The World." Through charitable initiatives, educational support, community outreach programs, empowerment projects, and humanitarian services, the Foundation continues to touch and transform lives across communities.
Nicholas firmly believes that every person deserves an opportunity to thrive regardless of their background or circumstances. He is committed to building a future where love overcomes suffering, hope defeats despair, and communities unite to create lasting change.
As a leader, Nicholas inspires others through his dedication, integrity, and servant-hearted approach. He warmly welcomes individuals, organizations, volunteers, and well-wishers to partner with Nicoville Foundation in its mission to bring healing, hope, and transformation to the world.
"True success is not measured by what we accumulate for ourselves, but by the lives we touch, the hope we restore, and the love we share with others."
Lwasa Nicholas Kaweesi Founder & Executive Director Nicoville Foundation Spread Love, Heal The World
